headline: Session 49 exhausted release, runtime, persistence, and hydration authority work, then shipped exact deploy provenance and read-only save preflight with every direct suite green.

items.title: public-release-contract
items.evidence: Canonical identity, health/deploy/footer/parity/rollback artifacts and honest live edge/email gates replace stale registry-green assumptions.

items.title: weekly-command-authority
items.evidence: Both adapters execute one validated deterministic command and receipt envelope with failure-safe tactic cleanup and coalesced bootstrap fallback.

items.title: save-compatibility-transaction
items.evidence: Version, shape, integrity, migration, and hydration are one recovery-safe boundary that preserves the active franchise on failure.

items.title: hydration-authority
items.evidence: Late browser responses cannot repaint a new team/week/filter; actual discarded writes are visible and same-authority refreshes remain valid.

items.title: second-order-provenance-and-preflight
items.evidence: Exact live deploy currency and read-only save compatibility are now executable proofs, not release/import assumptions.

followUps.title: external-release-evidence
followUps.evidence: Configure canonical edge headers and produce a real received-message forwarding receipt, then verify the deployed workflow artifact exactly.

blockers.title: launch/SPARKED
blockers.evidence: External edge/email evidence and sibling registry reconciliation remain incomplete; they do not block this direct-main development checkpoint.

honestyLedger.title: superseded-failures
honestyLedger.evidence: The stale fixture and over-fencing browser failures remain recorded as diagnostics and were superseded only by explicit full green reruns.

honestyLedger.title: health-is-not-launch
honestyLedger.evidence: The static health receipt explicitly reports launchReady false; no source-local artifact fabricates external readiness.

honestyLedger.title: cost-discipline
honestyLedger.evidence: All work is local/static and zero variable cost; flat-rate plan accounting is not treated as a product alarm.

diffStat.suite: canonical 370/370; long 3/3; Playwright 18/18; Pages build/smoke; doctor blockingFailing 0; Genius cache 0 open
